title: UX UI Design Manager
description:
EXPERIENCE DESIGN MANAGER

Job Summary :

As a Experience Design Manager, you will play a pivotal role in crafting engaging and intuitive user experiences across various digital platforms. Your expertise in production design and usability principles will be crucial in developing innovative solutions that align with our business goals. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure the delivery of high-quality designs that enhance user satisfaction and drive business success.

Experience : 10 to 12 yrs

Technical Skills : 

Usability/UCD Principles,Interaction Design,UI Design Patterns,Adobe Photoshop,Visual Branding,Visual Design Elements & Funda,Responsive Web Design,Figma,Production Design,Creative Design-Websites&Apps

Nice to have skills :

Domain Skills : Product Consol&Restructuring,New Product Initiatives

Responsibilities :

- Lead the design process from concept to completion, ensuring alignment with user-centered design principles

- Collaborate with product managers and developers to create seamless user experiences across web and mobile applications

- Utilize Figma to design and prototype user interfaces that are both visually appealing and functional

- Apply UI design patterns to develop intuitive and efficient user interfaces

- Ensure designs are responsive and adaptable to various screen sizes and devices

- Integrate visual design elements to enhance the aesthetic appeal of digital products

- Develop visual branding strategies that align with company objectives and resonate with target audiences

- Create innovative web and app designs that captivate and engage users

- Use Adobe Photoshop to refine and enhance design elements for optimal presentation

- Implement interaction design techniques to facilitate user engagement and satisfaction

- Work on new product initiatives to drive innovation and market differentiation

- Contribute to product consolidation and restructuring efforts to optimize user experience

- Collaborate in a hybrid work model, balancing remote and in-office work to maximize productivity. 

Qualifications

- Demonstrate proficiency in production design and usability principles to create user-centric solutions

- Exhibit expertise in Figma for designing and prototyping user interfaces

- Show understanding of UI design patterns and responsive web design to ensure adaptability

- Possess knowledge of visual design elements and fundamentals for aesthetic enhancement

- Apply visual branding skills to develop cohesive brand experiences

- Utilize creative design skills for websites and apps to captivate users

- Leverage Adobe Photoshop for refining design elements

- Implement interaction design techniques to enhance user engagement

- Experience in new product initiatives and product consolidation is a plus.
